_description: Bounded OmniSafe PPO-Lag diagnostic (#63). Runs seeds {23,29,31} with the approved Jacobian/local-sensitivity cost bridge and shared checkpoint-sweep evaluator. Diagnostic only; it does not replace the #51 five-seed SC-PPO record.
name: rough_terrain_omnisafe_ppolag_diagnostic
